top3.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session) 
FROM (
    SELECT session
    FROM action_log
    WHERE action = '/regist/input'
    INTERSECT
    SELECT session
    FROM action_log
    WHERE action = '/regist/confirm'
) AS sessions_with_both_pages;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session)
FROM (
    SELECT session
    FROM action_log
    WHERE action = '/regist/input'
    INTERSECT
    SELECT session
    FROM action_log
    WHERE action = '/regist/confirm'
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session) 
FROM (
    SELECT session
    FROM action_log
    WHERE action = '/regist/input'
    INTERSECT
    SELECT session
    FROM action_log
    WHERE action = '/regist/confirm'
) AS sessions_with_both_pages;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session) 
FROM (
    SELECT a1.session
    FROM action_log a1
    INNER JOIN action_log a2 ON a1.session = a2.session
    WHERE a1.action = '/regist/input' 
      AND a2.action = '/regist/confirm'
      AND a1.stamp < a2.stamp
) AS sessions_with_both_pages_in_order;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session)
FROM (
    SELECT DISTINCT a1.session
    FROM action_log a1
    INNER JOIN action_log a2 ON a1.session = a2.session
    WHERE a1.action = '/regist/input' 
      AND a2.action = '/regist/confirm'
      AND a1.stamp < a2.stamp
);

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session) 
FROM (
    SELECT session
    FROM action_log
    WHERE action = '/regist/input'
    INTERSECT
    SELECT session
    FROM action_log
    WHERE action = '/regist/confirm'
) AS sessions_with_both_pages;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session) 
FROM (
    SELECT a1.session
    FROM action_log a1
    INNER JOIN action_log a2 ON a1.session = a2.session
    WHERE a1.action = '/regist/input' 
      AND a2.action = '/regist/confirm'
      AND a1.stamp < a2.stamp
) AS sessions_with_both_pages_in_order;

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session)
FROM (
    SELECT session
    FROM action_log
    WHERE action IN ('/regist/input', '/regist/confirm')
    GROUP BY session
    HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN action = '/regist/input' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
       AND SUM(CASE WHEN action = '/regist/confirm' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0
       AND MIN(CASE WHEN action = '/regist/input' THEN stamp END) < MAX(CASE WHEN action = '/regist/confirm' THEN stamp END)
);

final.sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT session) 
FROM (
    SELECT session
    FROM action_log
    WHERE action = '/regist/input'
    INTERSECT
    SELECT session
    FROM action_log
    WHERE action = '/regist/confirm'
) AS sessions_with_both_pages;
